item.title: Version 1.1.0 (build 2)
item.description:
Added

  • Automatic updates: ClaudeWidget can now keep itself current. It asks for your permission first, then checks for new versions on a standard schedule and installs them in place through the familiar macOS update dialog.
  • Updates section in Settings: check for updates on demand, control automatic checking and downloading (downloads stay off unless you turn them on), and see your current version and when updates were last checked.
